    Goal - Class in app.models
    Represents a financial or personal goal for a user.
    Goal(int, String, double) - Constructor for class app.models.Goal
    Creates a new goal for a specific user with a name and target amount.
    GoalController - Class in app.controllers
    Controller class responsible for handling goal-related requests and delegating them to the GoalService.
    GoalController() - Constructor for class app.controllers.GoalController
     
    GoalService - Class in app.services
    Service class responsible for managing user financial goals.
    GoalService() - Constructor for class app.services.GoalService
     
    GoalUI - Class in app.ui
    User Interface class responsible for creating and managing the goal creation screen.
    GoalUI(Stage, User) - Constructor for class app.ui.GoalUI
    Constructs the GoalUI with required dependencies.
